tasks.label: JRiver deploy x11vnc fix
args: export TERM=xterm; set -e; pct stop 900 --skiplock 1 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pct destroy 900 --purge 1 >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; mode=userdefaults var_ctid=900 bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/steveonjava/ProxmoxVE/main/ct/jrivermediacenter.sh)"
